description_long: This is a minimalist, modern single bed with a light wood finish and a simple, rectangular platform frame. The bed features a solid headboard at one end, while the opposite end is open with no footboard. The sleeping surface is flat and appears to be divided into three sections, likely panels or slats, with no visible mattress or bedding. The frame sits low to the ground, supported by two wide side panels and a solid base, giving it a sturdy and stable appearance. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or compact living spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist single bed with a light wood platform frame, solid headboard, and no visible mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the bed, the solid headboard on the left, and the flat, panelled sleeping surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard and the width of the bed, with the flat surface extending toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the bed's length and the open end without a footboard, with the headboard on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid base and the open end of the bed, with no headboard visible from this angle.
